message:
feat: add shell rc patching

Add PatchShellRC() and PatchAllShells() functions to automatically
configure shell rc files (.bashrc, .zshrc) to source the env.sh script.

The patching is idempotent (won't add duplicate lines) and only patches
shells that already have an rc file (doesn't create new ones).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
